description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a single build stage. Add a build job that runs on all branches except master, uses a before_script to log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, shares the same before_script login step, and runs docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . followed by docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Both jobs belong to the build stage and no caches, artifacts, or deployments are defined.
